problem id: c11eba1d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10001011 -> 01100111
  10111111 -> 11101111
  01111001 -> 01111111
  00011100 -> 00011111
  11111101 -> 01111111
  01001000 -> 10111111
  10000010 -> 01101111
  10010111 -> 10100111

query: 00001101
predicted answer: 11010111
